rulings.Case Title: CONSUELO LOPEZ et al VS. AC AND S, INC. et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON FRIDAY, OCTOBER 26, 2007, LINE 2, DEFENDANT THE C.P. HALL COMPANY'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS CONTINUED TO NOVEMBER 7, 2007. PLAINTIFF SERVED ITS OPPOSITION AT DEFENSE COUNSEL'S OLD ADDRESS AND DEFENSE COUNSEL MISTAKENLY BELIEVED THAT THE MOTION WAS UNOPPOSED. PLAINTIFF TO IMMEDIATELY SERVE DEFENSE COUNSEL AT THE CORRECT ADDRESS AND DEFENDANT TO FILE AND SERVE ITS REPLY BRIEF BY NOVEMBER 2, 2007. =(302/REQ/PB)
